title: lastrea lugubris
intro: Lastrea lugubris, also known as the sorrowful fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Blechnaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Lastrea lugubris are often used to make infusions and decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments, including coughs and colds, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne.
